storyOfTheWeek.title: Shopify/liquid: Performance: 53% faster parse+render, 61% fewer allocations
storyOfTheWeek.summary: Shopify/liquid: Performance: 53% faster parse+render, 61% fewer allocations PR from Shopify CEO Tobias Lütke against Liquid, Shopify's open source Ruby template engine that was somewhat inspired by Django when Tobi first created it back in 2005. Tobi found dozens of new performance micro-optimizations using a variant of autoresearch, Andrej Karpathy's new system for having a coding agent run hundreds of semi-autonomous experiments to find new effective techniques for training nanochat.
